title: Max Dot Product of Two Subsequences
hints: This problem involves making sequential choices about which elements to include, suggesting a dynamic programming approach on indices.
Define dp[i][j] as the max dot product using subsequences from nums1[i:] and nums2[j:]. Consider three transitions: pair current elements, skip i, or skip j.
Handle the non-empty constraint by initializing with negative infinity and ensuring at least one pair is formed before propagating results.
